changes.before: He led them between the tents at a pace that said he had already chosen what to leave undone for the next five minutes.
changes.after: He led them between the tents fast enough to show what he had already chosen to leave undone for the next five minutes.

changes.before: Up close the town's survival looked worse.
Dry enough to be almost funny. Not meant that way.
His eyes went from Sylvanas to Jaina to Uther and sharpened.
changes.after: He checked Sylvanas, Jaina, and Uther in one sweep.

changes.before: Jaina turned her head and gave him one clean look.
Everything about him turned bad news into motion.
Scholomance pressed at the edge of memory and stayed there.
changes.after: The memory of Scholomance stayed at the edge of her mind.

changes.before: Uther looked at Jaina then, properly, perhaps for the first time since the tent.
changes.after: Uther turned to Jaina then, properly, for the first time since the tent.

changes.before: He made endurance look like an ordinary task someone had to do well.
Not enough to stop for. Too much to ignore.
Arthas's pace reached ahead of him.
changes.after: Mounted officers were already moving before Arthas reached the line.

changes.before: They rode for the head start while there was still one to ride for.
